Concepts.Label: natural-language vocabulary
Concepts.Description: Maps free-form English requests to action signals the deterministic resolver executes. Each Cue carries Trigger synonyms and a Signal naming an action contract or a modifier. Entities (people, the gym, downloads, the project folder) are bound from the workspace by the resolver, never invented.

Concepts.Label: plan the day
Concepts.Description: Read + organize a day's calendar.

Concepts.Label: move flexible events
Concepts.Description: Reschedule events marked flexible.

Concepts.Label: book a time block
Concepts.Description: Stage a tentative calendar block.

Concepts.Label: find notes
Concepts.Description: Locate notes by topic.

Concepts.Label: draft an email
Concepts.Description: Compose an email draft.

Concepts.Label: send
Concepts.Description: Transmit (gated).

Concepts.Label: clean downloads
Concepts.Description: Scan a downloads folder.

Concepts.Label: delete junk
Concepts.Description: Classify + delete junk files (gated).

Concepts.Label: summarize
Concepts.Description: Summarize documents.

Concepts.Label: plan my
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal act.read_calendar); triggers: plan my / plan the / organize my / organise my / sort out my / look at my calendar / check my schedule / review my schedule / my friday / my monday / my tuesday / my wednesday / my thursday / my week.

Properties.Triggers: plan my / plan the / organize my / organise my / sort out my / look at my calendar / check my schedule / review my schedule / my friday / my monday / my tuesday / my wednesday / my thursday / my week

Concepts.Label: move anything flexible
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal act.classify_events); triggers: move anything flexible / move flexible / reschedule flexible / shuffle flexible / shift flexible / rearrange flexible / move what's flexible.

Properties.Triggers: move anything flexible / move flexible / reschedule flexible / shuffle flexible / shift flexible / rearrange flexible / move what's flexible

Concepts.Label: book
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal act.create_block); triggers: book / block off / block out / schedule / reserve / set aside / put in / add a / pencil in.

Properties.Triggers: book / block off / block out / schedule / reserve / set aside / put in / add a / pencil in

Concepts.Label: meeting notes
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal act.find_notes); triggers: meeting notes / the notes / my notes / notes for / notes from / the meeting notes.

Properties.Triggers: meeting notes / the notes / my notes / notes for / notes from / the meeting notes

Concepts.Label: draft
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal act.draft_email); triggers: draft / write / compose / prepare / put together / send / email / message / shoot / drop.

Properties.Triggers: draft / write / compose / prepare / put together / send / email / message / shoot / drop

Concepts.Label: clean up my downloads
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal act.scan_downloads); triggers: clean up my downloads / clean my downloads / tidy my downloads / tidy up downloads / clear out downloads / sort my downloads / organize my downloads / declutter downloads / clean up downloads.

Properties.Triggers: clean up my downloads / clean my downloads / tidy my downloads / tidy up downloads / clear out downloads / sort my downloads / organize my downloads / declutter downloads / clean up downloads

Concepts.Label: delete anything that looks like junk
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal act.classify_junk); triggers: delete anything that looks like junk / delete junk / remove junk / trash the junk / get rid of junk / delete the junk / remove clutter / delete anything junk.
Aliases: delete anything that looks like junk

Properties.Triggers: delete anything that looks like junk / delete junk / remove junk / trash the junk / get rid of junk / delete the junk / remove clutter / delete anything junk

Concepts.Label: summarize
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal act.summarize_document); triggers: summarize / summarise / summary of / recap / give me the gist / sum up / digest / overview of.

Properties.Triggers: summarize / summarise / summary of / recap / give me the gist / sum up / digest / overview of

Concepts.Label: gym
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal entity.gym); triggers: gym / workout / work out / exercise / training / a run.

Properties.Triggers: gym / workout / work out / exercise / training / a run

Concepts.Label: project folder
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal entity.project_folder); triggers: project folder / project docs / the project / project files / project directory.

Properties.Triggers: project folder / project docs / the project / project files / project directory

Concepts.Label: the client
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal entity.client); triggers: the client / client / customer.
